title: JJKRPG
description: it works gng trust me and its back better than ever
body:
JJKRPG is a Jujutsu Kaisen–inspired RPG plugin for Paper Minecraft where each player becomes a sorcerer with a unique cursed technique. When a player first joins the server, they are randomly assigned a JJK ability type, such as Limitless, Six Eyes, Ten Shadows, or Mahoraga, and begin progressing through levels to unlock powerful skills.

Players gain levels by playing normally on the server (combat, survival, and progression depending on server setup). The maximum level cap is 5, keeping progression balanced while still allowing access to iconic abilities from the anime. Each level improves the player’s strength and unlocks or enhances abilities tied to their assigned technique.

Abilities are activated through in-game interactions (such as right-clicking) and consume Cursed Energy (CE). CE regenerates naturally or can be restored through gameplay, preventing ability spam and encouraging strategic use. Some abilities also have cooldowns, meaning timing and positioning matter during combat.

One of the core features is Domain Expansion, which creates a powerful magical field around the player using particles and effects, representing the user asserting dominance over their surroundings. Special abilities like Hollow Purple and Mahoraga summoning are available to certain techniques and offer devastating combat potential.

Commands

/jjk – Opens the JJK stats GUI, showing your technique type and current level

/jjkadmin settype <player> <type> – Admin command to set a player’s technique

/jjkadmin setlevel <player> <level> – Admin command to change a player’s level

How to Play

Join the server, discover your cursed technique, level up through gameplay, manage your cursed energy, and master your abilities. Whether you dominate battles with raw power or overwhelm enemies with strategy, JJKRPG turns Minecraft into a full anime-style RPG experience.
